mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, order_history AS orderHistory, sample_id AS sampleId, sample_type AS sampleType, sample_position AS samplePosition, primer, primer_type AS primerType, primer_position AS primerPosition, primer_concentration AS primerConcentration, seq, project, carrier_name AS carrierName, antibiotic_type AS antibioticType, plasmid_length AS plasmidLength, fragment_size AS fragmentSize, test_result AS testResult, origin_concentration AS originConcentration, template_plate_no AS templatePlateNo, template_hole_no AS templateHoleNo, performance, return_state AS returnState, flow_name AS flowName, plate_no AS plateNo, hole_no AS holeNo, belong_company AS belongCompany, produce_company AS produceCompany, produce_id AS produceId, hole_number AS holeNumber, layout, create_user AS createUser, create_time AS createTime, remark FROM yk_sample_info WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId}
SELECT template_hole_no,produce_id FROM yk_sample_info WHERE template_plate_no = #{plateNo} AND template_hole_no IS NOT NULL AND template_hole_no != '' ORDER BY template_hole_no

SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, COUNT(*) AS templateNumber, MAX(c.customer_name) AS customerName, MAX(c.address) AS customerAddress, s.sample_id AS sampleId, MAX(s.sample_type) AS sampleType, MAX(s.primer) AS primer, MAX(s.primer_concentration) AS primerConcentration, MAX(s.carrier_name) AS carrierName, MAX(s.antibiotic_type) AS antibioticType, MAX(s.fragment_size) AS fragmentSize, MAX(s.test_result) AS testResult, MAX(s.origin_concentration) AS originConcentration, MAX(s.template_plate_no) AS templatePlateNo, MAX(s.template_hole_no) AS templateHoleNo, MAX(s.performance) AS performance, MAX(s.return_state) AS returnState, MAX(s.flow_name) AS flowName, MAX(s.create_user) AS createUser, MAX(s.remark) AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE template_plate_no = #{req.plateNo} GROUP BY s.order_id, s.sample_id

SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.address AS customerAddress, s.sample_id AS sampleId, s.sample_type AS sampleType, s.primer AS primer, s.primer_concentration AS primerConcentration, s.carrier_name AS carrierName, s.antibiotic_type AS antibioticType, s.fragment_size AS fragmentSize, s.test_result AS testResult, s.origin_concentration AS originConcentration, s.template_plate_no AS templatePlateNo, s.template_hole_no AS templateHoleNo, s.performance AS performance, s.return_state AS returnState, s.flow_name AS flowName, s.create_user AS createUser, s.origin_hole_no AS originHoleNo, s.remark AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id where flow_name = '模板生产'
AND s.order_id = #{query.orderId}
AND s.sample_id = #{query.sampleId}
AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.customerName}, '%')
AND s.create_user like CONCAT('%', #{query.createUser},'%')
AND s.sample_type like CONCAT('%', #{query.sampleType},'%')
AND s.template_plate_no like CONCAT('%', #{query.templateNo},'%')
ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.email AS customerEmail, s.create_time AS createTime, s.order_id AS orderId, s.sample_id AS sampleId, s.return_state AS returnState, s.remark AS remark FROM yk_sample_info s LEFT JOIN yk_order_info o ON s.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN yk_customer_info c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.flow_name = '模板邮件' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' ORDER BY c.id, s.create_time DESC
